What's Included

Everything in Our Kitchen Fitting Service in Hemel Hempstead

Our kitchen fitting service covers every element of the job — from removing the old kitchen to handing over a fully fitted, ready-to-use kitchen. One team, one quote, no loose ends.

✓

New kitchen unit installation — base, wall and tall units

✓

Worktop fitting — laminate, quartz, granite and solid wood

✓

Sink and tap fitting — undermount, inset and Belfast styles

✓

All plumbing connections — supply and waste

✓

Kitchen tiling — wall tiles and splashbacks

✓

Kitchen flooring — tiles, LVT and engineered wood

✓

Appliance integration — ovens, hobs, dishwashers and fridges

✓

Extractor fan and lighting installation

✓

Soft-close hinges, handles and finishing hardware

Why Choose Us

Why Hemel Hempstead Homeowners Choose BMB Renovation

We live and work locally. When you choose BMB Renovation, you are working with a team whose reputation depends on the quality of every job — not a national firm that has moved on when problems appear.

📍

Local to Hemel Hempstead

Based in Watford (WD24), we work throughout Hemel Hempstead regularly. Quick site visits, prompt quotes, easy to reach.

🔧

Fitting Specialists

We fit correctly — not just quickly. Proper waterproofing, level setting, sealed joints and aligned fittings every time.

🔨

All Trades In-House

Plumbing, tiling, carpentry and electrics — all handled by our own team. No subcontractors, no gaps in accountability.

💬

Clear Written Quotes

Every project starts with an itemised written quote. No hidden extras, no surprises once work begins.

🏆

15+ Years Experience

Over fifteen years fitting and renovating properties across Hemel Hempstead, Watford and Hertfordshire.

✨

Premium Finish

Straight lines, sealed joints, aligned fittings. We check every detail before we consider a job complete.

📋

Free Home Visit

We come to your Hemel Hempstead property, assess the space and give you a written quote — free, with no commitment required.

🛁

Supply or Fit Only

Already have your units or suite? We will fit them. Need us to source as well? We can handle that too.

Start with a Free Consultation
Common Questions

Kitchen Fitting in Hemel Hempstead — Frequently Asked Questions

The cost of kitchen fitting in Hemel Hempstead depends on the size of the room, the units or suite selected, and the scope of work. BMB Renovation provides a free, no-obligation written quote after a home visit. Call +44 7775 758 717 to arrange yours.

Most kitchen fitting projects in Hemel Hempstead are completed within 1 to 2 weeks, depending on the specification. We agree a clear programme with you before any work begins and keep to it.

Yes — BMB Renovation is based in Watford, WD24 5AN, and regularly carries out kitchen fitting projects across Hemel Hempstead and the surrounding area. We offer a free home visit and written quote.

Yes. Our in-house team covers every trade: plumbing, tiling, carpentry, lighting, flooring and decoration. No subcontractors — one consistent standard of quality throughout.
